headline: American Express Taps Sports Fans With New Fanatics Rewards Card
summary: Fanatics and American Express (NYSE:AXP) are launching a new co branded credit card designed for sports fans. The card integrates Fanatics' digital reward currency, FanCash, with American Express Membership Rewards. The partnership also adds Fanatics as a Membership Rewards transfer partner across its platform.
